featureName: BUG-029-003: Dev `docker-compose.yml` violates Gate G028 NO-DEFAULTS via 14 `${VAR:-default}` substitutions

executionHistory.evidence: Inspected docker-compose.yml at HEAD 6cdabe62 and observed 14 `${VAR:-default}` silent-fallback substitutions in violation of Gate G028 (NO-DEFAULTS / fail-loud SST policy): (a) 6 build-metadata occurrences across smackerel-core + smackerel-ml services (SMACKEREL_VERSION:-dev, SMACKEREL_COMMIT:-unknown, SMACKEREL_BUILD_TIME:-unknown × 2 services); (b) 2 env-file occurrences (SMACKEREL_ENV_FILE:-config/generated/dev.env × 2 services); (c) 2 image-ref occurrences (SMACKEREL_CORE_IMAGE:- and SMACKEREL_ML_IMAGE:-); (d) 4 volume-mount occurrences (BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR:-./data/bookmarks-import, MAPS_IMPORT_DIR:-./data/maps-import, BROWSER_HISTORY_PATH:-./data/browser-history/History, TWITTER_ARCHIVE_DIR:-./data/twitter-archive). The pre-fix state masked real misconfiguration in any unsanctioned `docker compose -f docker-compose.yml up` invocation that did not first run `./smackerel.sh config generate` — the fallback values silently substituted dev / unknown / unknown for build metadata, silently fell back to dev.env for SMACKEREL_ENV_FILE, and silently treated unset image refs as build-from-source. Direct HL-RESCAN-012 finding from the self-hosted readiness re-scan against da263ffe / 6cdabe62. The runtime contract test internal/deploy/compose_contract_test.go enforces the same SST policy on deploy/compose.deploy.yml but had no equivalent on the dev compose file.

Three coordinated source changes that close 10 of 14 violations and explicitly defer 4. (1) scripts/commands/config.sh: appended a 5-block resolution section before the mkdir -p line (Insert A, lines 940-952): `if [[ -z "${X+set}" ]]; then X="default"; fi` for SMACKEREL_VERSION (default `dev`), SMACKEREL_COMMIT (default `unknown`), SMACKEREL_BUILD_TIME (default `unknown`), SMACKEREL_CORE_IMAGE (default empty), SMACKEREL_ML_IMAGE (default empty), with leading comment block explaining HL-RESCAN-012 / Gate G028 chain + CI export precedence. Then appended 5 emission lines into the heredoc that writes config/generated/<env>.env (Insert B, lines 965-969). Total: +35 / -0 lines. (2) docker-compose.yml: converted 6 build-metadata occurrences (lines 75-77 + 162-164) from `${X:-default}` to `${X:?must be set in env file (run ./smackerel.sh config generate)}`; converted 2 env-file occurrences (lines 108 + 194) to `${SMACKEREL_ENV_FILE:?must be set — use ./smackerel.sh up or export SMACKEREL_ENV_FILE=config/generated/dev.env}`; converted 2 image-ref occurrences (lines 59 + 146) from `${X:-}` to `${X?must be set in env file (run ./smackerel.sh config generate); empty value is allowed for build-from-source dev}` (no-colon form, allows empty as the build-from-source toggle); added an 11-line deferral comment block immediately above the 4 volume-mount lines (lines 115-125) documenting why they remain in `:-default` form (load-bearing empty-value contract with connector ${X:+/data/...} env-override pattern). Total: +47 / -10 lines. (3) internal/deploy/dev_compose_default_fallback_test.go (NEW FILE, 270 lines): declares `package deploy`, imports fmt/os/path/filepath/regexp/sort/strings/testing, defines devComposeDefaultFallbackAllowlist map (4 volume-mount vars + per-var inline justifications), defines devComposeDefaultFallbackRegex (`\$\{([A-Z][A-Z0-9_]*):-[^}]*\}`), implements findDevComposeUnauthorizedDefaultFallbacks helper (line-by-line scan, comment-line skip, regex-match, allowlist filter, sorted dedup output), and 4 Test* functions: TestDevComposeContract_NoUnauthorizedDefaultFallbacks (live-file scan), TestDevComposeContract_AdversarialUnauthorizedDefaultFallback (4 sub-cases: build-metadata regression / env-file regression / image-ref regression / novel non-allowlisted var), TestDevComposeContract_AdversarialAllowlistRespected (per-var-not-per-line gating), TestDevComposeContract_AdversarialCommentLinesIgnored (comment-line skip). HL-RESCAN-012 attribution in package docstring (line 2) + docstring rationale (line 17) + live-file failure message (line 130) + adversarial sub-case failure message (line 181). NO change to deploy/compose.deploy.yml, NO change to internal/deploy/compose_contract_test.go, NO change to config/smackerel.yaml, NO change to scripts/lib/runtime.sh, NO change to .github/workflows/*.

Targeted dev-compose contract suite GREEN: go test -count=1 -v -run '^TestDevComposeContract' ./internal/deploy/... PASS in 0.007s — TestDevComposeContract_NoUnauthorizedDefaultFallbacks PASS, TestDevComposeContract_AdversarialUnauthorizedDefaultFallback (4 sub-cases) PASS, TestDevComposeContract_AdversarialAllowlistRespected PASS, TestDevComposeContract_AdversarialCommentLinesIgnored PASS. Targeted prod-compose canary suite GREEN: go test -count=1 -v -run '^TestComposeContract|^TestVulnGateContract|^TestBundleHashContract' ./internal/deploy/... PASS in 0.021s — every pre-existing TestComposeContract_* + TestVulnGateContract_* + TestBundleHashContract_* test PASS unchanged (the new dev-compose test is purely additive against a different file). Cross-package smoke: ./smackerel.sh test unit --go returns [go-unit] go test ./... finished OK — every internal/* and cmd/* package returns ok. The new tests run as part of the persistent in-tree adversarial suite — every ./smackerel.sh test unit --go invocation (CI + developer pre-push) re-validates the dev-compose contract.

No simplification opportunities surfaced. The fix is the minimum viable change at three layers: (1) +35 / -0 lines in scripts/commands/config.sh — the 5-block resolution + 5 emission lines are the minimum to feed the new fail-loud substitution forms in the compose file via the existing SST emission pattern. (2) +47 / -10 lines in docker-compose.yml — 10 substitution-form changes (the converted vars) + 11-line deferral comment block (justifies the 4 unconverted vars). (3) 270 lines in the new test file — reuses the existing repoRoot(t) helper from compose_contract_test.go; declares one allowlist + one regex + one helper + 4 Test* functions. The volume-mount deferral is justified by the load-bearing empty-value contract with connector code (separate follow-up bug filed). The per-var allowlist (vs per-line) is the simplest gating that catches multi-var-line regressions. The comment-line skip is the simplest false-positive suppression for the deferral comment block.

No flaky-test or stability concerns surfaced. The new tests are deterministic: no time.Now, no random IDs, no goroutine concurrency, no I/O beyond a static file read of docker-compose.yml plus regex matching on small in-memory fixtures. All 4 test functions PASS in 0.007s with zero variance across re-runs. The SST emission resolution uses `${X+set}` shell substitution-context detection which is fully deterministic (no timing dependency, no race, no env-pollution risk — the resolution runs in a subshell isolated from the developer's current shell).

Security review: A05 Security Misconfiguration — the fix STRENGTHENS the existing Gate G028 NO-DEFAULTS / fail-loud SST policy by mechanically locking dev-compose Gate G028 compliance against future drift. No new attack surface introduced. No PII handled (the SST emission writes safe placeholders only; the contract test operates on YAML structure only). The fix closes a real-world misconfiguration risk: pre-fix, any developer or CI invocation that called `docker compose -f docker-compose.yml up` without first running `./smackerel.sh config generate` would silently substitute fallback values for build metadata, env-file path, and image refs — masking real misconfiguration. Post-fix, Compose aborts with a named-var error pointing the developer at the fix path. The dev-compose Gate G028 surface now matches the prod-compose Gate G028 surface (both are locked by static-file lint tests). No secret values ever appear in `docker-compose.yml` (secret keys are written into the env file via config generate from `config/smackerel.yaml`, which is a separate concern).

Static checks: gofmt -l internal/deploy/ empty (exit 0); go vet ./internal/deploy/... exit 0. Cross-package smoke: ./smackerel.sh test unit --go returns [go-unit] go test ./... finished OK — every internal/* and cmd/* package PASS. SST emission GREEN: bash scripts/commands/config.sh --env dev regenerates config/generated/dev.env with 6 SMACKEREL_* lines (5 new + pre-existing SMACKEREL_ENV_FILE); same for --env test. Compose substitution GREEN: docker compose --env-file config/generated/dev.env -f docker-compose.yml config -q exits 0; same for test.env. Compose substitution RED proof: docker compose --env-file /dev/null -f docker-compose.yml config -q exits 1 with `error while interpolating services.smackerel-core.env_file.[]: required variable SMACKEREL_ENV_FILE is missing a value: must be set — use ./smackerel.sh up or export SMACKEREL_ENV_FILE=config/generated/dev.env` (proves Gate G028 fail-loud is active end-to-end). RED→GREEN proof of test: temporarily reverted docker-compose.yml line 75 from `${SMACKEREL_VERSION:?must be set in env file (run ./smackerel.sh config generate)}` to `${SMACKEREL_VERSION:-dev}` via replace_string_in_file; re-ran TestDevComposeContract_NoUnauthorizedDefaultFallbacks, observed FAIL with `docker-compose.yml violates Gate G028 (NO-DEFAULTS / fail-loud SST policy) — HL-RESCAN-012:\n  - 75:${SMACKEREL_VERSION:-dev} (use ${VAR:?error} fail-loud form, or add VAR to devComposeDefaultFallbackAllowlist with justification)` message; restored via replace_string_in_file → test PASS. Existing TestComposeContract_LiveFile + 9 pre-existing TestComposeContract_* adversarial tests + TestVulnGateContract_LiveFile + 10 sub-tests + TestBundleHashContract_LiveFile + 4 sub-tests all PASS unchanged. Full evidence in report.md > Validation Evidence + > Test Evidence + > Audit Evidence.

OWASP A05 review GREEN (improved). Privacy review GREEN (no PII; no real hostnames/IPs/tailnet identifiers in any of the 7 packet artifacts; home paths captured in evidence blocks redacted to `~/`). Minimum-viable-change audit GREEN: 3 source files modified (scripts/commands/config.sh +35 / -0, docker-compose.yml +47 / -10, new internal/deploy/dev_compose_default_fallback_test.go 270 lines). NO production runtime Go/Python code modified. NO assertComposeContract function body edited. NO deploy/compose.deploy.yml change. NO internal/deploy/compose_contract_test.go change. NO config/smackerel.yaml change. NO Dockerfile change. NO CI workflow change. NO scripts/lib/runtime.sh change. NO foreign-owned spec content edited (specs/029-devops-pipeline/spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, state.json, uservalidation.md, parent report.md untouched per bubbles.devops mode artifact-ownership rules). Cross-package smoke clean. All canaries (9 pre-existing TestComposeContract_* + LiveFile + VulnGate 11 + BundleHash 5) PASS unchanged. Generic-only constraint preserved (no real hostnames/IPs/tailnet identifiers; uses SST substitution forms exclusively; the only address strings in the change are loopback / generic SST substitution forms). Promotion decision: SHIP_IT.

Bug spec/design/scopes/scenario-manifest/report/uservalidation/state artifacts authored at specs/029-devops-pipeline/bugs/BUG-029-003-docker-compose-default-fallback-no-defaults-sweep/. The bug-local scenario-manifest.json declares 7 scenarios (SCN-029-003-A through SCN-029-003-G covering SST emission / Compose substitution GREEN / Compose substitution RED proof / lint test live-file / lint test adversarial novel var / lint test adversarial per-var allowlist / lint test adversarial comment-line skip). No external doc updates required: the fix is purely a contract-test extension + SST emission addition + dev-compose substitution-form change; no operator workflow change, no Deployment.md change, no copilot-instructions.md change, no README change, no CI workflow change. Foreign-owned spec 029 content untouched per bubbles.devops mode artifact-ownership rules.

certification.auditNote: self-hosted readiness re-scan (system review session 2026-05-14, against HEAD 6cdabe62) finding HL-RESCAN-012 (P3). The dev compose file docker-compose.yml had 14 `${VAR:-default}` silent-fallback substitutions in violation of Gate G028 (NO-DEFAULTS / fail-loud SST policy). The runtime contract test internal/deploy/compose_contract_test.go enforced the equivalent contract on deploy/compose.deploy.yml correctly, but the dev-compose surface was unprotected. Pre-fix, any unsanctioned `docker compose -f docker-compose.yml up` invocation (without first running ./smackerel.sh config generate) would silently substitute fallback values — masking real misconfiguration. Fix has three coordinated layers: (1) scripts/commands/config.sh adds a 5-block resolution + 5 emission lines for SMACKEREL_VERSION/COMMIT/BUILD_TIME/CORE_IMAGE/ML_IMAGE so the SST emission feeds the new fail-loud substitution context; (2) docker-compose.yml converts 6 build-metadata + 2 env-file forms to ${X:?error} (fails on unset OR empty), 2 image-ref forms to ${X?error} (fails on unset only — empty is the build-from-source toggle), and adds an 11-line deferral comment block above the 4 volume-mount forms (load-bearing empty-value contract with connector code; explicit follow-up filed); (3) new internal/deploy/dev_compose_default_fallback_test.go adds a persistent in-tree static-file lint test with 4 Test* functions (1 live-file canary + 3 adversarials) that mechanically lock dev-compose Gate G028 compliance against future drift. The 4 unconverted volume-mount vars are explicitly allowlisted with inline justification + per-var allowlist gating in the test (catches multi-var-line regressions). RED→GREEN proven via temporary revert of `${SMACKEREL_VERSION:?...}` to `${SMACKEREL_VERSION:-dev}` on line 75: TestDevComposeContract_NoUnauthorizedDefaultFallbacks FAILS with `docker-compose.yml violates Gate G028 (NO-DEFAULTS / fail-loud SST policy) — HL-RESCAN-012:\n  - 75:${SMACKEREL_VERSION:-dev}` message naming the line + form + fix-path + breadcrumb; restoration returns the test to PASS. Compose substitution RED proof via docker compose --env-file /dev/null: exits 1 with `required variable SMACKEREL_ENV_FILE is missing a value: must be set — use ./smackerel.sh up or export SMACKEREL_ENV_FILE=config/generated/dev.env` (proves Gate G028 fail-loud is now active end-to-end). Compose substitution GREEN proof against regenerated dev.env / test.env: both exit 0. Cross-package smoke (./smackerel.sh test unit --go) PASS — every internal/* and cmd/* package returns ok. Spec 042 BUG-042-001..005 prod-compose canaries + spec 047 vuln-gate canary + BUG-047-001 bundle-hash canary all PASS unchanged (the new dev-compose test is in a separate file targeting a different live file). Generic-only constraint preserved: zero real hostnames/IPs/tailnet identifiers introduced. Three-source-file change boundary: scripts/commands/config.sh, docker-compose.yml, internal/deploy/dev_compose_default_fallback_test.go (new). Bug-packet artifacts contained in specs/029-devops-pipeline/bugs/BUG-029-003-docker-compose-default-fallback-no-defaults-sweep/. Foreign-owned spec 029 content (spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, state.json, uservalidation.md, parent report.md) untouched per bubbles.devops mode artifact-ownership rules. Promotion decision: SHIP_IT.

scopeProgress.name: Convert 10 of 14 dev-compose `${VAR:-default}` occurrences to fail-loud forms via SST emission, defer 4 volume-mount cases with inline documentation, and add an adversarial static-file lint test
scopeProgress.notes: 3 source files modified (scripts/commands/config.sh +35 / -0 lines, docker-compose.yml +47 / -10 lines, NEW internal/deploy/dev_compose_default_fallback_test.go 270 lines). Three coordinated layers close 10 of 14 violations and explicitly defer 4. Layer 1 (SST emission): 5-block `if [[ -z "${X+set}" ]]; then X="default"; fi` resolution + 5 heredoc emission lines for SMACKEREL_VERSION/COMMIT/BUILD_TIME/CORE_IMAGE/ML_IMAGE. Layer 2 (Compose form conversion): 6 build-metadata `:?error` forms + 2 env-file `:?error` forms + 2 image-ref `?error` (no-colon, allows empty) forms + 11-line deferral comment block above 4 volume-mount `:-default` forms (load-bearing empty-value contract). Layer 3 (lint test): persistent in-tree TestDevComposeContract_* (4 functions + sub-cases) with per-var allowlist + comment-line skip + HL-RESCAN-012 attribution in package docstring + every failure-case message. Both regenerated env files (dev.env + test.env) carry 6 SMACKEREL_* lines; Compose substitution exits 0 against both; Compose substitution against /dev/null exits 1 with named-var fix-path error. RED proof via line 75 revert: lint test FAILS with named-line + named-form + fix-path + HL-RESCAN-012 breadcrumb. GREEN proof via restoration: lint test PASS. All 9 pre-existing TestComposeContract_* + TestComposeContract_LiveFile + TestVulnGateContract_* + TestBundleHashContract_* PASS unchanged. Cross-package smoke clean. Static checks clean. Full DoD evidence inline in scopes.md.
